text.title: Claude Code Headless Default Decision Tree

root-question.text: Is the task coding / devops / research / content authoring with shell affinity?

question.text: Do tool requirements fit the MCP catalogue (no exotic custom tools)?
Is shell-out permitted (not blocked by sandbox / SaaS embed)?
Is inner-loop programmatic control required (step-by-step state machine)?

branch.conclusion: Drop to SDK with documented switch_trigger.
Use claude-code-headless with four guards (-p, --allowedTools, --max-turns, stream-json).

example.p: coding_ish=true → tools_fit_mcp=true → shell_ok=true → inner_loop_required=false → conclusion: use claude-code-headless.
